Engine

Pandora's Box

Landing
78%

Client: /simulation/[sessionId]

User submits text/voice turns from SimulationShell.

API: POST /api/sessions/:id/turns

Receives body and forwards to processTurn(sessionId, body).

Validation + Context Load

turnInputSchema.parse, load session, load world definition.

DefaultPolicyGuard

Checks disallowed actions before state mutation.

Blocked Turn Result

Safe narration/choices when request violates policy.

RuleBasedEventSelector

Selects event template from world + current state.

HeuristicStateReducer

Applies turn to produce nextState and stateDelta summary.

RollingMemorySummarizer

Updates relationship memory for active event actors.

OpenAITextGenerator

Generates narration/dialogue/uiChoices/audioDirectives or fallback output.

PersistenceStore

updateSession + appendTurn to Neon (DATABASE_URL) or in-memory store.

API Response Envelope

Returns updated session + turn payload to client.

Client Render Update

Transcript, choices, and world meters refresh on screen.

Audio: STT Route

POST /api/audio/transcribe -> gpt-4o-mini-transcribe.

Audio: TTS Route

POST /api/audio/speak -> gpt-4o-mini-tts (mp3 base64).
